content.en:
What level is above the first-class supreme, many supremes of the human race were not clear before, but Ye Tian informed them in the past exchanges.

God will!

Above the first-class supreme is the god general, this is the division of combat power in the chaos, the god general is actually still the earth zun realm, that is, the heavenly zun realm, but the combat power is too strong.

In this era of the universe, there is no god general, if Ye Tian reaches the battle power of the god general, he can definitely easily sweep all the supremes, unless other forces also give birth to the god general's combat power, otherwise he will not be able to compete with Ye Tian at all.

"The combat power of the god general, this is not some bullshit god general of the god race, that is the battle power of the god general in the chaos, it can easily kill the first-class supreme, if the ten thousand law supreme reaches the battle power of the god general, our human race will be completely above the ten thousand races!"

The Mixed Yuan Supreme was also quite excited.

"Wait, in a few thousand years, the Ten Thousand Laws Supreme should come out!"

Kunwu Supreme Dao.

Subsequently, the Terran Supremes dispersed.

Originally, they thought that Ye Tian had fallen in the misty area and was still discussing, but now that they were sure that Ye Tian was not dead, there was naturally no need to continue the discussion.

In a flash, another 7,000 years have passed.

Ye Tian had been in the Temple of the Chaos God Realm for 10,000 years, and this was also the time stipulated in the assessment.

“10%"

Ye Tian sighed deeply.

He comprehended 6% of the Void Heaven Diagram in 3,000 years, and thought that he would be able to comprehend at least 10% of the Void Heaven Diagram in the remaining 7,000 years.

But as a result, the next 7,000 years only understood the 4% rule.

"If you continue to comprehend at this rate, what year and month will it take to comprehend the entire Void Heaven Diagram? Millions of years, or tens of millions of years?"

Ye Tian didn't know, but he knew that it would take a long time for him to comprehend this Void Heaven Diagram, and he might not even be able to comprehend it.

Because if you don't have enough understanding, you can't understand some things.

In addition, he doesn't know what the Void Heaven Diagram is useful for, but it must be very important, otherwise the third round of assessment will not be the Enlightenment Void Heaven Map.

"When the time for the third round of assessment is up, the examiner will comprehend 10% of the Void Heaven Diagram, and 10 points will be counted!"

"All assessments are over, and the examiner gets 40 points!"

"Examiner, congratulations on obtaining the status of an official disciple of the reserves!"

A series of voices resounded in Ye Tian's mind.

At this moment, Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

He knew that his assessment results were very good, because even Yuntan Tianjun had only obtained the status of a registered disciple, while he had obtained the status of a reserve official disciple, which was much better than a registered disciple!

A reserve official disciple means that he has the qualifications of a formal disciple, but at present, the qualifications have not fully reached the level of a formal disciple, so he can only be regarded as a reserve official disciple.

Outside the Temple.

As a clan guarding here, the Niu Ren clan naturally quickly learned about Ye Tian's assessment results.

"Ye Tian, the human race of this universe, has obtained the status of an official disciple of the reserves!"

A majestic Ox Clan powerhouse appeared and spoke.

But he was full of old age, as if the end of his life was approaching.

The powerhouses above the cosmic god in the universe seem to have an eternal lifespan, but in fact, they also have a lifespan limit, but they can't get out of it, and they can't survive the great destruction of the universe, so they can't wait for the lifespan limit to fall and die.

And this old man has lived for too long, and even spent many cosmic epochs in this universe, so now the limit of life has come.

But his strength is very strong, and he has slowly cultivated over the long years, and now he has the combat power of a three-star god general, and he is also the only three-star god general of the cattle clan.

"Ancestor!"

Many strong men of the Ox Clan shouted one by one.

"Ye Tian is an official disciple of the reserves, and he is expected to be a formal disciple, although you can't go out, but in the Chaos God Realm, try to help Ye Tian as much as possible, understand?

The ancestor of the cattle tribe said.

"Yes!"

Many strong people of the Ox Race responded.

When the ancestor left, Niu Ryu was shocked and said, "That human kid actually obtained the status of an official disciple of the reserves, his strength is not strong, could it be that his potential and understanding are too terrifying?"

"Niu Ryu, you brought him in, and when he comes out, you will be responsible for guiding him, trying to give him some help, and improve his strength!"

"Third Elder, I understand!"

Niu Ryu replied.

Temple.

Ye Tian's assessment ended, and a figure appeared.

He was very illusory, but his body was completely formed by rules, and a wisp of breath could suppress Ye Tian.

"Senpai!"

Ye Tian said.

He knew that this senior should be the owner of the previous voice, but he didn't know what his identity was.

"Examiner, congratulations on becoming an official disciple of the reserves, I am a creature incarnated by that great being, named Shang, you can be the instrument spirit of this temple. I'm here to give you a reward, but you need to choose the reward. Remember, don't pick randomly, or it will affect your progress in the future!"

Shang said.

"Senior Shang, I understand!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Wow!

Shang waved his hand, and a classic book appeared.

"This is the Xuanxu Technique, a Chaos Body Refining Secret Technique created by a great being, and you have also cultivated a simplified version of the Body Refining Secret Technique, that secret technique is quite good, but it can't be compared to the Xuan Xuan Secret Technique, even the true original of that Body Refining Secret Technique can't be compared to the Xuan Xuan Secret Technique. It allows you to continue to expand the limit of your physical body in the Earth Venerable Realm, and refine it to an extremely powerful level, which is also one of the main means for the god general to improve his strength after that, otherwise it will be difficult if you want to continue to improve your strength!"

Shang introduced.

"Mystery !!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

He knew that the simplified version of the Chaos Body Refining Secret Technique that Shang said should refer to the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique, it turned out that it was just a simplified version, it must be a simplified version created by the Golden Desolate Old Man for the selection of heirs, and it was really necessary to worship the Golden Desolate Old Man as a teacher before it would be taught.

Immediately, Ye Tian accepted the Xuanxuan Formula!

Then, Shang took out three more treasures.

"The heart seal of time and space, which can fix the river of time and space, attract the true spirit seal, forcibly transcend, is suitable for ordinary universes, and requires three stars of the god to use it!"

"The Nine Treasure Beads can be used to temper your will and state of mind!"

"The Resurrection Pool, a special Chaos Spirit Treasure, can be resurrected nine times, and the Resurrection Pool will be shattered after nine times!"

Ye Tian looked at these three treasures, his eyes shining.

If he could, he would have wanted them all, but he could only choose one.

"The space-time heart seal can be forcibly transcended in the ordinary universe, it should be a treasure refined by that great being, the original Yuntan Heavenly Monarch was not a rebel but detached, relying on his own strength is not enough at all, it must be with the help of the power of the space-time heart seal. It's a pity that I don't want to be a simple detachment. But it needs the strength of a three-star god general to be used, and it is estimated that it will be difficult for his wife and sister to become a three-star god general. Therefore, it is useless to me!"

"The resurrection pool can allow me to have nine lives, this treasure seems to be very good, but with the means to save my life, and it is nine times, it may affect my mood. Besides, with my strength, I really don't necessarily encounter danger in the universe, and this treasure is not very useful!"

"The Nine Treasure Beads can be used to temper the will and state of mind, this is an incomparably rare treasure, at my level, it is very difficult to improve the state of mind and will, this treasure is of great use to me!"

Ye Tian immediately made a decision.

"I choose the Nine Treasure Beads!"

Ye Tiandao.
